17.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

17.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
17.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

17.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
17.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

17.gl: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
17.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

17.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
17.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

18.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
18.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

18.gl: properly, a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially, especially a sentence or formal decree (human or (participant's) divine law, individual or collective), including the act, the place, the suit, the cr
18.kj: [phrase] adversary, ceremony, charge, [idiom] crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of)
apparel, cloth(-es, -ing), garment, raiment. Compare H8008 (שַׂלְמָה).
18.dv: perhaps by permutation for the feminine of H5566 (סֶמֶל) (through the idea of a cover assuming the shape of the object beneath);

18.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
18.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
18.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

18.gl: properly, a guest; by implication, a foreigner

19.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

to have affection for (sexually or otherwise)
Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt

20.gl: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)
20.kj: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.
20.dv: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

20.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
20.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

20.gl: properly, to impinge, i.e. cling or adhere; figuratively, to catch by pursuit
20.kj: abide fast, cleave (fast together), follow close (hard after), be joined (together), keep (fast), overtake, pursue hard, stick, take.
